answers: Therapy types: CBT (changing thought patterns), psychodynamic (understanding past), DBT (managing emotions), and EMDR (trauma).
Finding a therapist: ask doctor for referral, check insurance coverage, try online therapy (BetterHelp), and interview therapists.
Benefits: better mental health, coping skills, self-awareness, improved relationships, and reduced anxiety/depression.
Therapy ki: professional er sathe kotha bole mental health improve kora. Shobai benefit paye — shudhu problems hole na.

feelings.question: therapy ki help kore?
feelings.answer: Yes, therapy can provide professional support for individuals experiencing mental health issues such as depression, anxiety, or stress. Therapists may offer coping strategies, mindfulness exercises, and other techniques to help individuals manage their symptoms and improve their overall well-being.
